<think> The question asks about the head coach of the 2015-16 Missouri Tigers women's basketball team. To answer this, I need to recall information about the team's coaching history. I know that Robin Pingeton was the head coach of the team from 2011 to 2016. Since the question mentions a sixth year head coach, I can infer that the coach in question is likely Robin Pingeton, who was hired to replace another coach. I need to recall who the previous head coach was. After some thought, I remember that Matt Bollant was the head coach of the team before Robin Pingeton. Therefore, Robin Pingeton was hired to replace Matt Bollant.</think>
<answer> Matt Bollant </answer>
